S.FORM: == pulung sausi ku tademaw nu Taywan Yincumin == tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihcan 11 a bulad tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihca 10 a bulad === tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihca 9 a bulad ===
S.PHON: == pur~ɾuŋ sausi ku tadəmaw nu tajwan jinʦumin == tadəmaw nu jinʦumin, pur~ɾuŋ sausi katukuħ **** a miħʦan ** a bur~ɾad tadəmaw nu jinʦumin, pur~ɾuŋ sausi katukuħ **** a miħʦa ** a bur~ɾad === tadəmaw nu jinʦumin, pur~ɾuŋ sausi katukuħ **** a miħʦa * a bur~ɾad ===
S.FORM: == pulung sausi ku tademaw nu Taywan Yincumin == tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihcan 11 a bulad tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihca 10 a bulad === tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihca 9 a bulad ===
S.PHON: == pur~ɾuŋ sausi ku tadəmaw nu tajwan jinʦumin == tadəmaw nu jinʦumin, pur~ɾuŋ sausi katukuħ **** a miħʦan ** a bur~ɾad tadəmaw nu jinʦumin, pur~ɾuŋ sausi katukuħ **** a miħʦa ** a bur~ɾad === tadəmaw nu jinʦumin, pur~ɾuŋ sausi katukuħ **** a miħʦa * a bur~ɾad ===
